note: Constructive up-tape but breakout breadth not yet confirmed. computed.blend_reason: Four names combine aligned momentum with realised vol inside the healthy 50-80 band (vol_quality 1.0), clearing 0.65. DOT trends mildly but its realised vol 28% is in the dead zone, so the gate zeroes it; ADA's healthy vol is irrelevant because it is in a downtrend (momentum_leg 0). The multiplicative gate requires BOTH legs.

entry: Enter assets with blend_score >= 0.65, max 5, ordered by blend_score.
Require strong momentum AND realised vol inside the healthy band; demote dead-vol (< 40%) and reject downtrends (momentum_leg 0).
Per-name weight capped at 17%; route by blend_score share of the risk budget; surplus to USDT reserve.
exit: Trim/exit when blend_score < 0.50 on the next rebalance.
Trim/exit when realised vol leaves the healthy band (blow-off exhaustion or dead-zone stall).
Trail with ATR(14); exit on a close back below EMA26 or the stop; force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 40%.
